instructions: 1. Eggs in a bowl, yogurt and oatmelon
2. Mix the greens and peppers of the pot.
3. The mixture of oily paper is cool and pour on the toast machine and cook.
4. Then fold the eyebrows and turkey f&uuml in the form of toast, adding.
5. After cooking a little more, oat toast is ready.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

oatmeal-and-nut-bread-lezzet.name: Oatmeal And Nut Bread
instructions: 1. Some recipes like extra time and labor.
2. Take the water into the cooking chamber of the machine.
3. Transfer all other materials into bread machine by blending in a bowl.
4. Set the cooking program of the machine for 3 hours.
5. At the end of the process of kneading and yeast, the oatmeal on the dough is sprinkled and leave not to pee.
6. Take the pişen bread from the machine and fortune by removing the mold after cooling.

oatmeal-burgers-argiro.name: Oatmeal Burgers
instructions: Clean, wash and cut potatoes into large pieces.
Place the potatoes in a large pyrex and add salt, pepper, mustard, olive oil and lemon juice.
Mix well to cover all pieces evenly.
Pour the potatoes with the beer and add the fresh herbs (thyme and oregano).
Bake in a preheated oven at 200oC for 1 hour and 15 minutes.

oatmeal-chocolate-coconut-chewy.name: Oatmeal Chocolate Coconut Chewy
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Cream together brown sugar, butter, and white sugar in a large bowl until smooth.
Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in milk and vanilla.
Combine flour, baking soda, and salt; stir into sugar mixture until well blended.
Stir in oats, chocolate chips, walnuts, and coconut until evenly distributed.
Drop by rounded spoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 12 minutes for a chewy cookie or 14 minutes for a firmer cookie.
Cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheets and then remove to wire rack. Cool completely and then store in a tightly sealed container.

oatmeal-raisin-energy-bites.name: Oatmeal Raisin Energy Bites
instructions: Mix oats, almond butter and honey in a large bowl.
Add raisins, pecans, cinnamon, vanilla and salt. Mix.
Place bowl in the refrigerator for 30-60 minutes, or until the mixture has solidified.
Mold mixture into bite-sized balls.
Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

oatmeal-salad-with-cranberries-fruits-an.name: Oatmeal Salad With Cranberries, Fruits And Nuts
oatmeal-salad-with-cranberries-fruits-an.original_name: Πλιγούρι σαλάτα με κράνμπερι, φρούτα και ξηρούς καρπούς
instructions: We start making the oatmeal salad, putting it in a bowl and covering it with boiling water (i.e. covering it).
Put the lid on and set aside for 15 minutes to soften and the oatmeal salad is perfect.
We fluff it by mixing it with a fork.
In another bowl, add parsley, mint, coriander, cranberry, pomegranate, peanut, juice, oil, and oatmeal.
Salt and mix well. We control acidity and salt.
We can add lemon juice.

oatmeal-apple-and-cinnamon-cookies-telec.name: Oatmeal, Apple And Cinnamon Cookies
oatmeal-apple-and-cinnamon-cookies-telec.original_name: Bolachas de aveia, maçã e canela

ingredients.item: Flocos de aveia finos para polvilhar
Demerara or dark sugar to sprinkle

instructions: Bring to the fire a pot with abundant water and salt. When you start boiling, add the rice, stir and let it cook well. Take it out of the fire and drain into a strainer. Wash the apples, remove their lumps and cut them into pieces. Line a board (42x 32 cm) with vegetable paper.

In a blending glass or robot, pour the boiled rice, apples, dates, oats, cinnamon, olive oil and water. Crush well, remove the preparation into a bowl and let it rest for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
Spread a few oatmeal flakes on a deep plate and lay on top a few spoonfuls of dough. Mold balls and spread a little. Distribute the cookies over the tray and sprinkle with some demerara sugar.
Take it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 20 to 30 minutes. Remove the biscuits from the oven and let it cool. Remove from the board and serve.

octopus-in-the-oven-with-vegetables-argi.name: Octopus In The Oven With Vegetables

ingredients.item: Two or three branches of parsley
Two or three branches of parsley

instructions: We clean the octopus first. We remove his mouth by entering our marker and pulling. Turn its hood, the inside outside, remove everything in it (holding only the whole, i.e. the egg). Wash very well and cut the octopus into large pieces (leave the tentacles whole if small or cut into bites if large). But remember that at any size you cut it, after cooking it will be reduced by 1/3.
Clean the potatoes, cut them into slices from 0.5 cm to 1 cm thick.
Clean the onions and cut them into rose rings and coat them on the potatoes.
Cut the tomatoes into slices and coat them.
Spread the octopus tentacles up. Add the herbs, laurel, thyme, parsley and garlic.
Salt pepper (with caution because the octopus if it is fresh is usually very salty).
Pour with the olive oil.
Cover with aluminum foil and close the baking pan around so that it keeps all the flavor.
Bake in a well preheated oven for 1 hour and 30 minutes at 170 degrees C. We do not add liquids because the octopus and vegetables will make a lot.

okra-with-chicken-argiro.name: Okra With Chicken
instructions: If you use fresh okra, they need a pre-work, just like we do for the lady okra.
Heat a large pan to burn. Add the frozen okra in and dry them over high heat for 2-3’
Add the vintage sticks and let them dry for 1’.
Add 3 tabletspoons of olive oil and sauté the okra for 2-3’.
Add the tomato paste and sauce for 1’.
Add the chopped onion and sauce for a few minutes to make it clear.
Add the garage and sauce for 1 minute.
Add salt and pepper.
Transfer the gums to a 32 cm baking pan, they must become a layer on the baking pan.
We sprinkle with parsley.
Add the chicken (tank or sot), grated tomato and salt and pepper.
Fill some water in the baking pan, barely covering the okra.
Pour with the remaining olive oil.
Cover the baking pan with lid or non-stick paper and foil.
Bake at 200oC in residence for about 1:10’
In the last half hour, we expose the baking pan so that the surface is golden.
The chicken with okra must stay almost with its oil.
Allow the food to stand for 30’ after being cooked, and then serve with fresh bread and feta cheese.
Be careful if you cook in air, the food may dry quickly.

old-fashioned-potato-soup.name: Old-fashioned Potato Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir in onion; cook and stir until onion has softened and turned translucent, about 5 minutes.

While onions are cooking, place diced potatoes, carrots, water, and chicken bouillon in another pot and bring to a boil. Cook until vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes. Do not overcook. Season with ground black pepper to taste.
Add flour to cooked onions to make a paste. Cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes. Gradually add milk and stir well. Cook over low heat stirring constantly until warmed through.
Add potato and carrot mixture. Stir in parsley and thyme and heat through. Serve hot.

omelette-with-mushrooms-argiro.name: Omelette With Mushrooms
instructions: Clean and cut the mushrooms in slices.
Finely chop the fresh onion and peppers.
Cut ham and cheese into small frames.
Heat the olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat to high heat.
Sauté the fresh onion and mushrooms for 2 minutes.
Add the peppers and sauce for 1 minute.
Add the ham and lower the focus.
Beat the eggs so that the yolk is properly joined with the white.
Add the milk, some salt and pepper. Mix the ingredients.
Pour the ingredients into the pan with the eggs.
Mix a little with the fork and add the cheese.
Raise the sides with a fork to mix the liquid eggs and start baking from the outside to the inside.
When you do, it becomes body and begins to stabilize.
Bake for 3 minutes on medium heat until it makes a light crust.
Turn over with the help of a plate to brown from the other side. Bake for 2 minutes.
Serve on a plate with tomatoes or season salad

one-pan-south-indian-chicken-semi-gravy.name: One Pan South Indian Chicken Semi Gravy
instructions: Heat the oil in a pan at medium heat. Then, add onions, curry leaves, cilantro, and mint. Saute on medium heat until golden brown.
Once golden brown, add ginger garlic paste and saute until the raw smell goes away.
Now add all the dry ingredients and stir together. Then, add the chopped tomatoes. Mix and cook uncovered for one minute.
After that, add the chicken and lemon juice. Combine well.
Add water. Cover for 8-10 minutes until chicken is cooked.
Remove the lid and leave open for one minute. After one minute, the gravy should be thick in consistency.
Adjust salt and garnish with coriander leaves.
Serve warm alongside fresh rice or naan.

one-skillet-cheesy-hamburger-and-egg-noo.name: One Skillet Cheesy Hamburger And Egg Noodle

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil. Cook egg noodles in boiling water until tender yet firm to the bite, about 6 minutes. Drain.

Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add ground beef to the skillet; season with salt and pepper. Cook and stir beef until crumbly and browned, about 8 minutes. Use a slotted spoon to remove beef to a plate; leave drippings in the skillet.

Reduce heat to medium-low. Add chicken broth, condensed soup, cheese, sour cream, rosemary, and thyme to drippings in the skillet. Cook and stir until well combined and cheese is melted, 5 to 7 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Reduce heat to low. Stir in egg noodles and ground beef; cook until heated through and evenly mixed, 3 to 5 minutes.

one-pot-lemon-garlic-shrimp-pasta.name: One-pot Lemon Garlic Shrimp Pasta
instructions: In a large pot, boil water and add pasta. Cook (stirring frequently) until al dente.
Drain and set pasta aside.
In the same pan, heat olive oil and 2 tablespoons of butter. Add garlic and crushed red pepper, cook until fragrant.
Toss in shrimp, salt and pepper to taste, and stir until shrimp start to turn pink, but are not fully cooked.
Add oregano and spinach, cook until wilted.
Return cooked pasta to the pot, add remaining butter, parmesan, and parsley. Stir until well mixed and the butter is melted.
When the shrimp are cooked, add lemon juice, mix once more, then serve while hot.
Enjoy!

one-pot-pantry-orzo-with-chickpeas.name: One-pot Pantry Orzo With Chickpeas

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about 1 cup); plus more for serving (optional)

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Heat ⅓ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy ovenproof pot over medium. Add 12 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and cook, stirring often, until softened and fragrant, 2–3 minutes. Add one 14-oz. jar pitted green olives, drained, coarsely chopped (about 1 cup), one 3.5-oz. jar capers, rinsed (about ½ cup), and ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and cook, stirring occasionally, just until fragrant, about 2 minutes.

Add 12 oz. orzo and one 6-oz. can tomato paste to pot and cook, stirring often, until tomato paste coats orzo and is darkened in color, about 4 minutes. Add one 15.5-oz. can chickpeas, rinsed, 1 tsp. dried oregano, 1 tsp. sugar, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 4⅓ cups water, stirring to scrape up any browned bits stuck to bottom of pot.

Cover pot, transfer to oven, and bake until orzo is tender and about 80% of liquid has been absorbed, 30–35 minutes (having some liquid on top is okay as the orzo will continue to absorb it). Remove pot from oven, remove lid, and stir in 2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup). Taste orzo and season with more salt if needed and freshly ground black pepper.
To serve, divide orzo evenly among shallow bowls. Top each bowl of orzo with more Parmesan if desired, then season with a little more black pepper.

orange-chocolate-cake-argiro.name: Orange Chocolate Cake
instructions: All materials must be at room temperature. Preheat the oven to 170oC in the resistors, bake on the bottom grill.
Butter and flower long form for cake 8×22 million.
Shake the flour and then sift the cocoa powder and set them aside.
In a bowl, add the butter and beat with a hand mixer for 1’ to fluffy.
Add the sugar and beat with the hand mixer for 3-4’ until the sugar melts and the butter hangs.
One – one, add the eggs.
Each time we drop an egg the previous one must have been fully incorporated.
Add the flour, salt and beat for a few seconds at low speed until the flour is lost.
Balance the mixture in two bowls.

orange-creme-brulee-recipe-lezzet.name: Orange Creme Brulee Recipe

ingredients.item: 80 gr powder sugar (half cream, half above)
1 piece of orange bark (without brushed, white part)

instructions: 1. Take the cream in a saucepan, add the inner the orange peel, vanilla and 40 g of sugar.
2. Heat from boiling point in medium fire.
3. Listen to more intense aroma for 5 minutes, then strain.
4. Rewind eggs in a separate container; wind.
5.  car your current wipe warm cream.
6. (Krema fence is not hot, otherwise the egg can be cut.
7. ) Share the heat resistant radiant containers.
8. Place these containers in a deep baking tray.
9. Add hot water to half of containers to the tray (mari method).
10. On 150°C, about 40–45 minutes in the refrigerator.
11. 11. The middle should be slightly shaken consistency.
12. After cooling at room temperature, wait at least 3–4 hours (preferably 1 night) in the refrigerator.
12. August Service euany of each ua thin layer of sugar sprinkler.
14 July The kitchen is purulent with sugar and close to caramelize.
15. If you do not have purulent, a few in the oventop grid; minutes fry in heat and wealth.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

outside-in-cheddar-sliders-on-mini-buns.name: Outside-in Cheddar Sliders On Mini Buns
instructions: Divide the ground chuck into 8 equal pieces.
Shape each piece of meat into a ball.
Press one piece of cheese into the center of a meatball.
Enclose the cheese completely within the meat.
Flatten the cheese-filled meatball into a patty 2 1/2- to 3-inches in diameter.
Repeat steps 3-5 to form 7 more patties.
Sprinkle both sides of all patties with salt and pepper.
Prepare a barbecue grill for medium-high to high heat.
Grill the patties until cooked to desired doneness and the cheese centers soften, approximately 5 minutes per side for medium doneness.
If desired, grill the cut side of the soft dinner rolls until lightly toasted, about 1 minute.
Transfer the cooked patties to the grilled rolls.
Let the sliders rest for 5 minutes before serving.

oven-roasted-potatoes.name: Oven-roasted Potatoes
instructions: Rinse potatoes and dry with a paper towel.
Place potatoes into a large bowl with oil, seasoned salt, salt, and pepper; mix until well coated.
Pour onto the prepared baking sheet and spread into an even layer.
Bake in the preheated oven, turning occasionally, until potatoes are tender and golden brown, about 1 hour.

oven-baked-pork-chops.name: Oven-baked Pork Chops
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Brown pork chops on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Stir rice and celery together in a baking dish. Place onion slices on top of rice and top with browned pork chops.
Bring water to a full boil in a saucepan. Add bouillon, Italian seasoning, and salt; stir to dissolve and pour mixture over pork chops. Cover with aluminum foil.

Bake in the preheated oven until rice is cooked and pork chops are fork-tender, 60 to 70 minutes. Remove aluminum foil and top with sliced bell peppers. Return to the hot oven and bake until peppers are tender, 10 to 15 minutes more.

oven-baked-pork-roll-with-mashed-au-grat.name: Oven-baked Pork Roll With Mashed Au Gratin
oven-baked-pork-roll-with-mashed-au-grat.original_name: Ρολό χοιρινό στο φούρνο με πουρέ ογκρατέν

ingredients.item: A little sage for the surface (optional)
A little sage for the surface (optional)

instructions: Open the meat first and spread as wide as possible so that we can wrap it easily in a roll.
Brush the inner side with soft butter and mustard, and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Spread the ground or chopped apple over the surface, sprinkle with fresh herbs and, if you want, add dried plums.
Wrap the pork tightly into a roll and tie it with a baking string to keep its shape.
Sprinkle the roll with some olive oil, sprinkle again with salt and pepper and brush with the hand so that the ingredients go everywhere.
Place the roll on the baking pan with the vegetables, add the wine and orange, as well as 2–3 small pieces of butter.
Cover the baking pan with non-stick paper and baking in a preheated evening at 1703
Then, remove the paper, turn the evening into 200°C in the air and allow the roll to brown around for about 20 minutes.
During baking, brush 2–3 times with honey, using a brush that we dip into the liquids of the baking pan, so that it is glazed and golden.
After baking, leave it to rest for 10–15 minutes and cut into slides.
Drain the liquids and use them to make wine sauce.
Serve the roll with the sauce separately and accompany with grated potato mashed potatoes.
